input.currentText: [fixture] EV adoption is at 10% nationally; 30% is the new-sales figure, not the stock. And that Stanford study was on knowledge workers in tech; it does not apply to assembly-line work.
input.parentText: [fixture] EV adoption is at 30% nationally; a Stanford study showed remote work boosts productivity 13%.
